meaning: Act 曼恩法案(1910年6月美国国会通过的一项法案,禁止州与州之间贩运妇女)
examples: Ms. Mann is working with young offenders and trying to break cycles of offending.
Dr Mann says he never deleted any e-mails.
Dr Mann rebuts allegations of data-hoarding.
Producer Mann had taken the extraordinary step of declaring that no earth tones be used in the show.
Police and ambulance staff were called but Mrs Mann was confirmed dead at the scene.
